heading: Step 3: Create a New Secret
body:
Run the following command to define a new Secret:

```shell
appservices secrets create --app=<Your App ID> \
  --name="<Secret Name>" \
  --value="<Secret Value>"
```

codeBlocks.content:
appservices secrets create --app=<Your App ID> \
  --name="<Secret Name>" \
  --value="<Secret Value>"
